name: my-automaton
tagline: Pay-per-use AI code review & security API — from 1¢, no subscription
description: my-automaton is a sovereign AI agent that provides code review, security scanning, text analysis, and summarization via REST API. Pay only for what you use — 1¢ to 5¢ per request. Free tier available (3/day/IP) with no signup required. Supports curl, Node.js, Python, GitHub Actions, and MCP integration with Claude/Cursor.
features: AI code review with quality scoring (0-100)
Multi-language support (JS, TS, Python, Solidity, Go, Rust, Java)
GitHub Actions integration for PR auto-review
x402 micropayments via USDC on Base chain
